title: neocodon altaicus
intro: Neocodon altaicus, also known as the Siberian rock jasmine, is a perennial plant native to the mountainous regions of Siberia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Neocodon altaicus include its ability to reduce stress and anxiety, improve sleep quality, and boost the immune system. In herbal preparations, Neocodon altaicus is often used as a tea or tincture, and its flowers can also be used to make a fragrant essential oil.
